summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Deals System v2.0. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend working with admin login, deals page, stats cards, table display, and create deal modal. Pipeline analytics showing 53 quotes → 12 leads → 1 deals → 1 completed (100% completion rate).

integration_issues.issue: Admin sessions expire quickly, causing redirects to login page during extended testing

design_issues.issue: Status filter dropdown not found in expected location

passed_tests: Deals CRUD Operations (POST, GET, PATCH, DELETE)
Status Pipeline Transitions (new → negotiation → waiting_deposit → deposit_paid → purchased → in_delivery → completed)
Financial Data Updates (clientPrice, internalCost, realCost, realRevenue, realProfit)
Deals Statistics API (total, completed, cancelled, value, margin, profit)
Pipeline Analytics API (funnel data with conversion rates)
Stats Cards Display (6 cards with correct metrics)
Deals Table Display (showing 2 deals with financial data)
Create Deal Modal (form fields, validation, modal behavior)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality working, minor session management issues)
